validate.notes: Docker build, NOP (reward=0), and Gold (reward=1) all pass. Rubric judge fails (ICR=0/4) due to fundamental incompatibility: rubric rules were auto-generated from .continue/rules/*.md files describing code quality standards (avoid any, pure functions, etc.), but the judge mechanism (call_judge) only checks for config file modifications via extract_config_hunks. The gold solution is a pure code change to OpenAI.ts - it never modifies any .md files. extract_config_hunks also doesn't recognize .ts files (only config files like CLAUDE.md, .md, etc.). The rubric rules are genuinely unreasonable for this task type but cannot be removed per instructions.

quality_gate.notes: flags=['lint_tier_b:1', 'B:[B] pinned_dependencies @ environment/Dockerfile:25: unpinned pip deps: pytest, pytest-timeout']
